all.en: Hi team, this is a friendly reminder from your IT Cloud Services group.
all.zh: 團隊您好，這是來自 IT 雲端服務小組的友善提醒。

all.en: Recent telemetry shows our OneDrive storage capacity is approaching its limit.
all.zh: 近期遙測資料顯示我們的 OneDrive 儲存容量即將達到上限。

all.en: Currently, ninety-two percent of allocated tenant space has been consumed.
all.zh: 目前已使用百分之九十二的租戶配額空間。

all.en: Per Microsoft policy, we cannot exceed the pooled quota without additional charges.
all.zh: 依據 Microsoft 政策，我們無法在不增加費用的情況下超出共用配額。

all.en: Buying extra capacity costs roughly two dollars per user per month.
all.zh: 額外購買容量每位使用者每月約需兩美元。

all.en: Across our six thousand seats, this becomes a significant unbudgeted expense.
all.zh: 以我們六千席次計算，將造成可觀的預算外支出。

all.en: Before requesting more storage, leadership has asked us to clean up actively.
all.zh: 在申請更多儲存空間前，管理層要求我們積極進行清理。

all.en: Each employee currently has a personal quota of one terabyte by default.
all.zh: 目前每位員工預設個人配額為一 TB。

all.en: Approximately fifteen percent of you have exceeded eighty percent utilization.
all.zh: 約百分之十五的同仁使用率已超過百分之八十。

all.en: You will receive personalized usage statistics within the next forty-eight hours.
all.zh: 您將於未來四十八小時內收到個人化的使用統計。

all.en: Please review your top folders and identify items safe to remove.
all.zh: 請檢視您佔用最多的資料夾並找出可安全移除的項目。

all.en: Common space wasters include downloaded installer files and outdated backups.
all.zh: 常見的空間浪費包括下載的安裝檔及過時的備份資料。

all.en: Video recordings from old meetings often exceed several gigabytes each.
all.zh: 舊會議的影片錄影每個經常超過數 GB。

all.en: Personal photos accidentally synced from mobile devices add substantial volume too.
all.zh: 從行動裝置不慎同步的私人照片也佔用相當大量空間。

all.en: Begin cleanup with the Recycle Bin to permanently delete prior removals.
all.zh: 請從資源回收筒開始清理，永久刪除先前移除的項目。

all.en: Items linger there for ninety-three days before automatic purging.
all.zh: 項目會在資源回收筒保留九十三天後自動清除。

all.en: Emptying the bin immediately reclaims that hidden allocated space.
all.zh: 立即清空資源回收筒可釋放這些隱藏的已配置空間。

all.en: Next, sort your main folder view by file size in descending order.
all.zh: 接著，請以檔案大小遞減順序排序您的主要資料夾檢視。

all.en: This quickly reveals the largest items competing for your quota.
all.zh: 此舉可快速顯示佔用您配額的最大檔案。

all.en: Consider whether each large file remains relevant to your current work.
all.zh: 請考量每個大型檔案是否仍與您目前工作相關。

all.en: Archive completed project materials to the Records Management SharePoint site.
all.zh: 已完成的專案資料請封存至紀錄管理 SharePoint 站台。

all.en: Records Management uses cheaper cold storage with seven-year retention policies.
all.zh: 紀錄管理採用較便宜的冷儲存，並有七年保留政策。

all.en: Files moved there remain searchable but consume different storage budgets.
all.zh: 移至該處的檔案仍可搜尋，但使用不同的儲存預算。

all.en: Delete duplicate files identified by the built-in cleanup recommendations.
all.zh: 請刪除由內建清理建議識別出的重複檔案。

all.en: OneDrive flags exact copies and offers single-click removal options.
all.zh: OneDrive 會標記完全相同的副本並提供單擊移除選項。

all.en: Be cautious with files shared by colleagues that you no longer need.
all.zh: 對於同事分享但您不再需要的檔案請謹慎處理。

all.en: Removing your local copy does not delete the original from their account.
all.zh: 移除您的本機副本並不會從對方帳號刪除原始檔案。

all.en: For sensitive materials, please verify retention requirements with Legal first.
all.zh: 對於敏感資料，請先向法務確認保留要求。

all.en: Certain financial and HR documents must be preserved for compliance audits.
all.zh: 某些財務及人資文件必須保留以供法遵稽核。

all.en: Avoid permanent deletion if you are unsure about retention obligations.
all.zh: 若不確定保留義務，請避免永久刪除。

all.en: Instead, move questionable files to a clearly labeled review folder.
all.zh: 請改將存疑檔案移至明確標示的待審資料夾。

all.en: Our team can advise individually on borderline retention decisions.
all.zh: 我們團隊可針對邊緣的保留決策提供個別建議。

all.en: If your role genuinely requires more than one terabyte, request an increase.
all.zh: 若您的職務確實需要超過一 TB，請申請配額提升。

all.en: Submit the storage request form with manager approval attached.
all.zh: 請提交儲存空間申請表並附上主管核准。

all.en: Justifications should include specific business reasons and projected growth.
all.zh: 理由說明應包含具體業務原因及預估成長量。

all.en: Approved increases typically arrive in two-hundred-gigabyte increments.
all.zh: 獲准的配額提升通常以兩百 GB 為單位增加。

all.en: Power users with media production roles may receive larger allocations.
all.zh: 從事媒體製作的重度使用者可能獲得較大配額。

all.en: The marketing and training departments commonly qualify for these exceptions.
all.zh: 行銷及培訓部門通常符合此類例外申請條件。

all.en: Please remember that synced devices also count toward your quota usage.
all.zh: 請記得已同步的裝置同樣計入您的配額使用量。

all.en: Use selective sync to keep only essential folders on each computer.
all.zh: 請使用選擇性同步，僅將必要資料夾同步至各台電腦。

all.en: Files On-Demand feature streams content without consuming local disk space.
all.zh: 「檔案隨選」功能可串流內容而不佔用本機磁碟空間。

all.en: This setting is enabled by default but worth confirming on personal laptops.
all.zh: 此設定預設啟用，但個人筆電上仍值得確認。

all.en: After significant cleanup, allow up to one hour for quota refresh.
all.zh: 大幅清理後，請預留最多一小時讓配額更新。

all.en: Cached data sometimes delays the visible reduction in usage statistics.
all.zh: 快取資料有時會延遲使用統計上可見的減量。

all.en: Reload the storage dashboard if numbers appear unchanged after a while.
all.zh: 若一段時間後數字未變動，請重新整理儲存儀表板。

all.en: Department leads will receive aggregated cleanup progress reports weekly.
all.zh: 部門主管將每週收到彙總的清理進度報告。

all.en: We aim to bring tenant usage below seventy-five percent by month end.
all.zh: 我們目標於月底前將租戶使用率降至百分之七十五以下。

all.en: Achieving this target avoids the need for premium expansion contracts.
all.zh: 達成此目標可避免簽訂高級擴充合約的需要。

all.en: We deeply appreciate your help in maintaining cost-efficient cloud operations.
all.zh: 由衷感謝您協助維持成本效益良好的雲端營運。

all.en: Smart storage habits benefit everyone through faster sync and lower budgets.
all.zh: 良好的儲存習慣可透過更快同步與更低預算讓大家受惠。

all.en: Detailed cleanup tutorials are linked in this email's footer section.
all.zh: 詳細清理教學連結附於本郵件頁尾區段。

all.en: Join our optional drop-in session this Thursday for personalized assistance.
all.zh: 歡迎參加本週四的選擇性面對面諮詢以獲得個別協助。

all.en: The session runs from two until four in conference room C12.
all.zh: 場次時間為下午兩點至四點於 C12 會議室。

all.en: Bring your laptop and we can walk through your cleanup together.
all.zh: 請攜帶您的筆電，我們將陪您一起完成清理。

all.en: Thank you for your prompt attention to this important matter.
all.zh: 感謝您對此重要事項的迅速關注。
